mapper.select: SELECT T .EQUIPMENT_ID "equipmentId", T ."EQUIPMENT_NO" "equipmentNo", T .EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME "equipmentTypeName", T .EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID "equipmentTypeId", T ."OPERATORS_ID" "operatorsId", T ."OPERATORS_NAME" "operatorsName", T ."TRUST_NO" "trustNo", T ."START_TIME" "startTime", T ."END_TIME" "endTime", T1.ID "vehicleTransferId", to_char(T1.CREATE_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') "bindingTime" FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A .EQUIPMENT_ID "EQUIPMENT_ID", A .EQUIPMENT_NO "EQUIPMENT_NO", A .EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME "EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME", A .EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID "EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID", A .OPERATORS_ID "OPERATORS_ID", A .OPERATORS_NAME "OPERATORS_NAME", c.TRUST_NO "TRUST_NO", c.ID "TRUST_ID", c.START_TIME "START_TIME", c.END_TIME "END_TIME" FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY A, T_PRD_WORK_PLAN b, T_BUS_TRUST c WHERE b.TRUST_ID = #{trustId} AND b.TRUST_ID = c. ID AND b.PLAN_TYPE = '3' AND A .WORK_PLAN_ID = b."ID" AND A .WORK_POSITION_CODE = '03' ) T LEFT JOIN T_BUS_VEHICLE_TRANSFER T1 ON T1.TRUST_ID = T .TRUST_ID AND T1.TRUST_CARGO_ID = #{trustCargoId} AND T1.EQUIPMENT_ID = T.EQUIPMENT_ID
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM T_BUS_VEHICLE_TRANSFER WHERE TRUST_CARGO_ID = #{trustCargoId} AND TRUST_ID = #{trustId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_VEHICLE_TRANSFER( ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, STATUS, DEL_FLAG, START_TIME, END_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{equipmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{equipmentNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{delFlag, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM T_BUS_VEHICLE_TRANSFER WHERE TRUST_CARGO_ID = #{trustCargoId} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT count(*) "count", TSPT_ID "tsptId" from WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE WEIGHT_GOODS IS NOT NULL AND TSPT_ID IN
TO_CHAR(#{id})
GROUP BY TSPT_ID

SELECT sum(WEIGHT_GOODS) "count", TSPT_ID "tsptId" from WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE TSPT_ID IN
TO_CHAR(#{id})
GROUP BY TSPT_ID

SELECT t.ID, t.TRUST_CARGO_ID, t.TRUST_ID, t.STATUS, t.DEL_FLAG, t.EQUIPMENT_ID, t.EQUIPMENT_NO, T2.MAC_TYPE_CODE as equipmentTypeId, T3.MAC_TYPE_NAME as equipmentTypeName, T4.DEPT_NAME FROM T_BUS_VEHICLE_TRANSFER t LEFT JOIN M_MACHINE T2 ON t.EQUIPMENT_ID = T2.ID LEFT JOIN M_MACHINE_TYPE T3 ON T3.MAC_TYPE_CODE = T2.MAC_TYPE_CODE LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT T4 ON T2.DEPT_ID = T4.ID WHERE TRUST_CARGO_ID = #{trustCargoId} AND TRUST_ID = #{trustId} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY T4.DEPT_NAME,t.EQUIPMENT_NO

SELECT a.ID "trustCargoId", A.TRUST_ID "trustId", b.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", b.SHIP_NAME "shipName", b.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", c.VOYAGE "voyage", b.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoOwnerName", b.CARGO_OWNER_ID, D .TRUST_NO "trustNo", b.PACKING_NAME "packingName", A.INNERTRANSPORT_TYPE, A.STATUS, A.BUSINESS_NO FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO A LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO b ON b. ID = A .CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM c ON b.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = c. ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST D ON A .TRUST_ID = D . ID
A.IS_SECOND_WEIGH = '1'
SELECT EMPTY_WEIGHT, HEAVY_WEIGHT FROM M_WEIGHT_RULES WHERE CARGO_CODE=#{cargoCode}

SELECT a.ID "trustCargoId", A.TRUST_ID "trustId", b.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", b.SHIP_NAME "shipName", b.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", c.VOYAGE "voyage", b.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoOwnerName", b.CARGO_OWNER_ID, D .TRUST_NO "trustNo", b.PACKING_NAME "packingName", A.INNERTRANSPORT_TYPE, A.STATUS, D.START_TIME, D.END_TIME FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO A LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO b ON b. ID = A .CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM c ON b.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = c. ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST D ON A .TRUST_ID = D . ID
A.IS_SECOND_WEIGH = '1' AND A.ID = #{trustCargoId}
mapper.update: update T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO set status = #{status}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{trustCargoId}

update T_BUS_VEHICLE_TRANSFER set ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, TRUST_ID = #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, TRUST_CARGO_ID = #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, EQUIPMENT_ID = #{equipmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, EQUIPMENT_NO = #{equipmentNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status}, DEL_FLAG = #{delFlag, jdbcType=BIGINT}, START_TIME = #{startTime}, END_TIME = #{endTime} where id = #{id}

update T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO set INNERTRANSPORT_TYPE = #{innertransportType, jdbcType=BIGINT}, TRANSPORT_TYPE = #{transportType, jdbcType=BIGINT}, EMPTY_WEIGHT = #{emptyWeight, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HEAVY_WEIGHT = #{heavyWeight, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRINT_POUND_ID = #{printPoundId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, PRINT_POUND_NUM = #{printPoundNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, IS_RULE = #{isRule} where id = #{trustCargoId}
update T_BUS_TRUST set PORT_CODE = #{workAreaCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PORT_NAME = #{workAreaNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{trustId}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT TBCI.ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBCI.SCN, TBCI.SHIP_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_ID, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_CODE, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TBCI.TRADE_TYPE, TBCI.PACKING_CODE, TBCI.PACKING_NAME, TBCI.COMPANY_ID, TBCI.COMPANY_NAME, TBCI.PARENT_ID, TBCI.ROOT_ID, TBCI.QUANTITY, TBCI.TON, TBCI.RIGHTS_QUANTITY, TBCI.SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, TBCI.IS_CLEAR, TBCI.CLEAR_BY, TBCI.CLEAR_BY_NAME, TBCI.CLEAR_DATE, TBCI.CREATE_BY, TBCI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBCI.CREATE_TIME, TBCI.UPDATE_BY, TBCI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBCI.UPDATE_TIME, TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE, TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE, TBCI.VOYAGE, TBCI.TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC INNER JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID
TBTC.id = #{id}

SELECT TBS.*, TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE FROM T_BUS_TRUST TBS LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBS.ID = #{trustId}

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(TDS.SHIP_NAME||'_'||TDSI.VOYAGE),',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TBCI.ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)+','\1' ) shipNameVoyage, REGEXP_REPLACE(LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(TDSI.ID),',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TBCI.ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)+','\1' ) shipvoyageItemId FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC INNER JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TDSI.ID = TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TDS.ID = TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID INNER JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP ON TPWP.TRUST_ID = TBTC.TRUST_ID WHERE EXISTS ( select * from ( select TRUST_ID TMPID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE ID = #{id} ) a where a.TMPID = TBTC.TRUST_ID ) GROUP BY TBTC.TRUST_ID

select a.ID, a.RATE_ITEM_CODE, a.RATE_NAME, a.RATE, a.TAX_RATE, a.BILL_DATE, a.RATE_ID, a.VOYAGE_ID, a.SHIP_VOYAGE, a.BILL_QUANTITY, a.BILL_QUANTITY2, a.AMOUNT_MONEY, a.TAX_AMOUNT, a.TRUST_ORDER_ID, a.CUSTOMER_ID, a.STATEMENT_BY, a.STATEMENT_TIME, a.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, b.CUSTOMER_NAME, CASE WHEN a.STATEMENT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN (CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(TCS.STATUS) >= 31 THEN TO_NUMBER(TCS.STATUS) ELSE TO_NUMBER(a.STATUS) END) ELSE TO_NUMBER(a.STATUS) END AS STATUS, a.company_id, a.company_name, TBR.PROCESS_NAME, TBR.PROCESS_CODE, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TBCI.CARGO_NAME from T_MISC_BILLING a inner join T_BUS_CUSTOMER b on a.CUSTOMER_ID=b.id LEFT JOIN M_FEE_ITEM MFI ON MFI.ITEM_CD = a.RATE_ITEM_CODE LEFT JOIN T_BUS_RATE TBR ON a.RATE_ID = TBR.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCS.ID = a.STATEMENT_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TDSI.ID = a.VOYAGE_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TDS.ID = TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID left JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCI.ID = a.CARGO_INFO_ID where OTHER_STATEMENT_ID = #{trustCargoId}

SELECT count(*) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND where IS_FINISHED = '0' AND IS_DELETE = '0' AND TSPT_ID IN (SELECT TO_CHAR(ID) FROM T_BUS_VEHICLE_TRANSFER WHERE EQUIPMENT_NO = #{equipmentNo} AND TRUST_CARGO_ID != #{trustCargoId} )
